title: Incident debug / containment — duplicate process topology and DB enforcement
objective: Narrow incident debug and containment task. First preserve evidence. Then verify duplicate process topology, DB path usage, unique index presence, bridge insert path usage, launcher responsibility, and whether safe containment can reduce the live stack to one valid topology. No production code changes allowed unless exact minimal fix is proven necessary, in which case stop and report BLOCKED.

phase_1_containment: report intended single valid process topology
if safe, stop duplicate extra stack processes so one valid stack remains
phase_2_root_cause: verify exact DB file path each active bot process is using
verify whether trades table has expected unique open-slug index
verify whether insert_open_trade is the path used for bridge-created trades
verify whether launch_all.py is responsible for duplicate spawning
verify whether bot_core.py instances belong to one launcher or multiple launchers
